message:
test(frankenterm-core): wire charset, modes, screen alignment, and soft reset into differential harnesses

Update both differential test harnesses (differential_terminal.rs and
differential_extras_reference.rs) to properly handle actions that were
previously no-ops:

- DesignateCharset: wire slot/charset through to cursor.designate_charset()
- SingleShift2/3: set cursor.single_shift for SS2/SS3 overrides
- DecSet/DecRst/AnsiSet/AnsiRst: track mode state via Modes struct
  instead of ignoring mode changes
- ScreenAlignment (DECALN): fill grid with 'E', reset margins, move
  cursor to origin
- RepeatChar: repeat last_printed character N times (requires new
  last_printed tracking field)
- SoftReset (DECSTR): reset modes, attrs, charset, cursor visibility,
  pending_wrap, and scroll region
- FullReset: also reset Modes and last_printed state

These changes improve differential test fidelity against the reference
terminal, enabling detection of charset and mode-related regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
